# Delivering Results with Excellence and Integrity


[![](https://www.robinsonventures.com/content/images/homepage/innov%20square.jpeg)](https://www.robinsonventures.com/innovation) [![](https://www.robinsonventures.com/content/images/homepage/invest%20square.jpeg)](https://www.robinsonventures.com/content/pages/equityinvesting)
[![](https://www.robinsonventures.com/content/images/homepage/strat%20square.jpeg)](https://www.robinsonventures.com/strategy) [![](https://www.robinsonventures.com/content/images/homepage/dev%20square.jpeg)](https://www.robinsonventures.com/busi-dev)
* * *
As an innovation, investment, strategy, and development consulting firm working in the healthcare and higher education market verticals, Robinson Ventures, LLC improves performance and develops future opportunities for our clients. 
Our approach is forming bridges between clients, thought leaders, investors, and higher education institutions. We use a variety of tools and techniques to solve business problems and create opportunities. 
We pride ourselves on not only suggesting the changes, but also implementing the recommended solutions to ensure success. 
[Experience](https://www.robinsonventures.com/about-us) [Case Studies](https://www.robinsonventures.com/showcase/case-studies)
## Let's start a conversation
#### Contact us today so that we can help you grow your organization!
#### [Contact Us](https://www.robinsonventures.com/content/pages/contact)
[![Robinson Ventures](https://www.robinsonventures.com/templates/custom/robinsonventures-2021/images/logo-robinson-ventures-w.png) ](https://www.robinsonventures.com/)
Robinson Ventures, LLC is based in Hartsville, South Carolina

# Keating Muething & Klekamp PLL Home Page

*   [![ALFA International](https://kmklaw.com/assets/htmlimages/ALFA%20International%20Logo%20-%20Horizontal_WHITE.png "ALFA International")](https://www.alfainternational.com/ "ALFA International (opens in a new window)")
    
      
    KMK Law is a proud member of ALFA International, the premier network of independent law firms. Founded in 1980, ALFA's 150 member firms throughout the world include 80 U.S. firms with offices in 95 of the 100 largest metropolitan areas and 70 international firms located throughout Europe, Asia, Australia/New Zealand, Africa, Canada, Mexico, and South America. KMK Law can draw upon the collective wisdom and expertise of the ALFA network to deliver highly effective legal solutions to our clients.

company.name: Constructive Capital for Urban Tech - 2150.vc
company.description:
# Constructive Capital for Urban Tech

[![2150.vc](https://2150.vc/wp-content/themes/2150Theme/public/images/logo-dark.svg)](https://2150.vc/ "Homepage")

We are

Taking on the biggest sustainability challenge on the planet  

[See more](https://2150.vc/#see-more)

Who we are

## We back tech entrepreneurs who are reimagining and innovating the Urban Stack

Building businesses that are changing how our cities are designed, constructed and powered, for good.

Hunting for Gigacorns – the technology champions of the coming decades with the potential to benefit billions of people, create billions in commercial value and lower gigatons of emissions.

And make the world of 2150 one we actually can and want to live in.

2150 is a part of [Urban Partners](http://urban.partners/), a platform of vision-aligned, differentiated, investment strategies shaped around urban problem solving.

[Our manifesto](https://2150.vc/manifesto/)

our approach

## A sustainable approach to venture

Led and backed by serious players in the Urban Stack, our team combines institutional strength and entrepreneurial spirit. Together, we’re building a new sustainable approach to venture.

One that sees opportunity in the greatest challenges of our time. That seeks to drive returns for our cities, citizens and investors. And that values SDGs as much as IRR.

We call it ‘Constructive Capital’

[Meet the team](https://2150.vc/team/)
